query: SELECT id, address, imageUrl FROM properties WHERE address LIKE '%Jessica%' OR address LIKE '%Alderwood%' OR address LIKE '%Hall%' OR address LIKE '%Windsong%' OR address LIKE '%Chevron%' OR address LIKE '%Prospector%' OR address LIKE '%Enchanted%' ORDER BY address;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4ZmCLDe5kjC12Ki.a08ad336f6b8 --database mwVy9Am3ywXkRkqF68TJjK --execute SELECT id, address, imageUrl FROM properties WHERE address LIKE '%Jessica%' OR address LIKE '%Alderwood%' OR address LIKE '%Hall%' OR address LIKE '%Windsong%' OR address LIKE '%Chevron%' OR address LIKE '%Prospector%' OR address LIKE '%Enchanted%' ORDER BY address;

rows.address: 991 E Enchanted Mesa St, Pahrump, NV 89048
